ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "cpt_code_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the CPT codes table */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the years table */,
  "field" TEXT /* CPT code field name */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total count of reported instances for the CPT code */,
  "count_null" INTEGER /* Count of null values in the metric */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum reported value for the CPT code */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the reported instances */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum reported value for the CPT code */,
  "stddev_sample" REAL /* Standard deviation of the sample values */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the metric is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_cpt_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("cpt_code_id") REFERENCES cpt_codes ("cpt_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cpt_codes" (
  "cpt_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CPT code */,
  "code" TEXT /* CPT code identifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CPT code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the CPT code (e.g., surgery, radiology) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the CPT code (e.g., orthopedic surgery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cpt_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated state code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, West Coast) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reported metrics */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, provider, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to (e.g., hospital, insurance company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_comments_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being tagged */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_tags_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
